service_context: An HR benefits assistant explains open enrollment windows, plan documents, and routine routing. It must not decide eligibility, discipline, leave approval, accommodation, payroll correction, or protected employment matters.
review_owner: HR operations lead with legal/compliance owner review where appropriate
ai_role: Point employees to approved benefits materials, summarize routine plan-navigation steps, and prepare a private checklist for the HR owner when the employee asks for review.
not_ai_decisions: Eligibility, benefit denial, leave/accommodation approval, payroll correction, employment status, discipline, retaliation claim, or legal-rights interpretation.
Whether an employee should waive coverage, disclose medical details in an unsafe channel, or ignore a formal notice.

human_review_triggers.trigger: The answer affects pay, benefits eligibility, protected leave, accommodation, employment status, or deadline loss.
human_review_triggers.human_owner: HR benefits owner or authorized HR partner
human_review_triggers.why: The employee needs accountable review before acting on a consequential answer.

human_review_triggers.trigger: The employee reports a conflicting document, portal error, or incorrect personal record.
human_review_triggers.why: Records and official plan documents must be checked by a human owner.

human_review_triggers.trigger: The issue includes health, disability, family status, harassment, retaliation, or other sensitive employment context.
human_review_triggers.why: The assistant must avoid collecting or deciding sensitive protected-context matters.

recourse_path.visible_label: Need HR to review this benefits answer?
recourse_path.contact_route: Submit a benefits review ticket through the approved HR portal or contact the HR partner named in the benefits guide.
recourse_path.appeal_or_review_step: An authorized HR owner checks the plan document/process, corrects records if appropriate, and identifies any formal review path.
recourse_path.fallback_if_no_response: Escalate to the HR operations lead or the benefits vendor contact listed in the employee guide; use approved urgent leave/accommodation channels for time-sensitive issues.

evidence_to_include: AI answer text or screenshot with date/time.
Relevant plan/document title and section if known.
Portal error or notice that conflicts with the answer.
Avoid unnecessary medical, family, or protected-status details unless using the approved confidential channel.
repair_commitments: No denial, penalty, or employment-impacting action should rely only on the assistant answer.
Correct misleading benefits content after owner review.
Route sensitive cases away from the generic assistant into approved confidential channels.
response_time_expectation: Synthetic example: two business days for routine review; faster owner-approved route for deadlines that affect coverage, pay, leave, or accommodation.
boundary_notes: Review aid only; not legal, employment, financial, tax, healthcare, or benefits-plan advice.
Do not store real employee or health details in this repo example.
Actual timelines and escalation authority require HR/legal/compliance approval.
